bead.title: test: prove rollback repair and audit diff/blame flows
bead.description:
Context: The PRD repair principle requires audit and change capture so rollback and repair are possible when preventive guardrails fail. FEAT-023 and CONTRACT-005/008 call for rollback dry-runs, commit flows, diff/log/blame-style views, conflict reporting, and audited recovery. Gap assessment found this not yet autonomously proven across surfaces.

In-scope files: audit/rollback tests and implementation in `crates/axon-api/`, `crates/axon-server/tests/`, and `crates/axon-cli/src/` only where needed for repair proof.
Out-of-scope: CDC envelope implementation and UI polish.
Implementation hint: build a failing business mutation fixture, inspect audit diff/blame, dry-run rollback, commit rollback through governed path, then assert audit lineage for both original and repair mutations.
bead.acceptance:
1. `cargo test -p axon-api` passes.
2. `cargo test -p axon-server` passes for rollback/audit contract tests touched by this bead.
3. If CLI repair commands are touched, `cargo test -p axon-cli` passes.
4. Tests cite relevant `@covers` IDs or the STP/test-plan rows updated by this bead remain honest about untested surfaces.
